Night School (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $77,339,130Details
International Box Office $26,806,503
Worldwide Box Office $104,145,633
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,388,714
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,730,742
Total $9,119,456
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A group of misfits are forced to attend adult classes in the longshot chance they’ll pass the GED exam.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,257,615 (35.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.84 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:74.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$29,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,010 opening theaters/3,019 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $101,533,978

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 28th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: September 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Trinidad)
September 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Egypt)
September 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Philippines)
September 27th, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
September 27th, 2018 (Wide) (Central America)
Video Release: December 11th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content throughout, language, some drug references and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2533 (Cert #51602), 6/19/2018)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Improvised, Intertitle, Prologue, Screenplay Written By the Star
